hotel_name: Khách sạn Tiến Minh 113 Lê Thanh Nghị (Tien Minh Hotel 113 Le Thanh Nghi)

reviews.title: Misleading (Stay Away)
reviews.text: First of all, the location is misguiding. It is 46 minutes walking distance away from the actual location. The room smells mold and stains on sheets. Parking is 150K per day.

reviews.title: Good value
reviews.positives: Near universities, hospitals, shops, food stores

reviews.title: Hotel Room and Service
reviews.text:
Bad service and not Polite and friendly 

No fail

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Good hotel with clean room and supportive staff. 😊

reviews.title: Great Location and Clean Stay
reviews.text: The property impresses with its excellent location and spotless cleanliness, making it a great value for the price. The facilities are well-maintained and meet expectations, contributing to a comfortable experience. Staff were generally helpful, though there was slight room for improvement in service. Overall, a highly recommended stay.

reviews.title: Inconfort et manque d’équipement
reviews.positives: Rien
reviews.negatives:
Le lit était aussi dur qu’une table
La chambre sentait fortement la cigarette et il n’y en avait pas d’autre
Il n’y avait pas de papier toilettes dans la chambre ni de bouteilles d’eau à disposition

reviews.title: 여긴 호텔이 맞습니다
reviews.text: 그런데 도착전 몇시에 도착하냐고  2번 이메일이 와서  밤비행기도착이어서 새벽한시는 넘는다고 답변했지만..도착한 순간..내 예약이 취소되었고 4인용 큰방 하나가 있다고 그러네요.기분나빠서 대충 자고 아침에 나왔는데..다시생각해봐도 이렇게 응대하는건 고객을 호구로ㅠ보는거니까...여기이용하지 마세라고 충고드립니다. 무거운가방을 가지고 문앞을 지나가도 직원은 빤히쳐다보기만 하네요..여긴 호텔이 아닌듯..

reviews.title: Au secours....
reviews.positives: Rien
reviews.negatives:
Chambre sans fenêtre.
 lit sans matelas.
bruyant au possible.
pas une bouteille d eau.
j ai du partir au bout de 2 nuits..

reviews.title: Reservation is not recommended
reviews.text:
1. Weird rules, you have to hand in the key when you go out, it's not safe 
2. The rooms I booked twice were terrible. I won't book again, and I won't pay attention to the need for notes 
3. The location is not close to the Hoan Kiem Lake at all, it's far away 
4. The towels were stained with blood and were not clean

reviews.title: Que des problèmes avec cet hôtel
reviews.positives: la chambre est propre
reviews.negatives:
Hotel situé dans un quartier sans aucun intérêt, et qui présente trop de problèmes.
En arrivant, la réceptionniste qui parle anglais encore plus mal que moi, compose un numéro sur son téléphone et vous donne le téléphone pour que vous fassiez son travail. Hors de question ! - 
- Comme beaucoup d'autres, l'hôtel refuse le paiement par carte bancaire
- mauvaise insonorisation dans la chambre, on entend trop les voisins
- contrairement à beaucoup d'autres hôtels, ils ne précisent pas sur Booking qu'il s'agit d'une chambre sans fenêtre
- la literie est tellement dure qu'on a l'impression de dormir par terre, ou sur une planche de bois. Donc , il faut un somnifère pour dormir.
- le carrelage dans la douche est très dangereux, car trop glissant.
- C'est le seul hôtel ** de mon séjour où il n'y a ni réfrigérateur, ni bouteille d'eau à l'arrivée . Ils en vendent à l'accueil, mais devant une telle attitude, j'ai acheté mes boissons dans les nombreux supermarchés aux alentours. A la réception, ils ont fait la tête en me voyant avec mes bouteilles, mais quand on veut jouer, il faut savoir qu'on peut perdre,
Je suis parti rapidement de cet hôtel pour aller dans l'hôtel que j'avais choisi lors de mon premier séjour à Hanoï, et qui ne présente pas tous ces problèmes.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Nó chung là không được điểm nào tốt.

reviews.title: Peu mieux faire.  Literie inadaptée au confort européen
reviews.positives: L'hôtel est proche de l'hôpital français de Hanoi, c'est ce que nous cherchions. Chambre propre et salle de bain bien agencée avec douche sémi fermée pour ne pas mettre de l'eau partout. Toujours de l'eau chaude.
reviews.negatives:
La literie était trop dure comme si on s'allongeait  sur une planche de bois. Absolument inconfortable et impossible de dormir. 
J'ai du demandé une couette supplémentaire
 pour faire une couche moelleuse et un oreiller supplémentaire qu'il a fallu payer en extra 
Nous nous sommes réveillés complètement courbaturés 
Mauvaise insonorisation entre les chambres, les  personnes de la chambre à côté parlaient très fort et nous entendions tout, cela tard le soir.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: Ks đăng ảnh chỉ đường sai gây hiểu lầm cho du khách. KS ở xa Khu Phố cổ, phòng nghỉ nhỏ, ít tiện nghi, tương đối sạch sẽ

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Le ménage est effectué tous les jours, serviettes changées. Accueil très sympathique. Grande chambre, bureau, table basse deux chaises, douche semi-fermée donc pas d’inondation de la salle d’eau. Endroit calme.
reviews.negatives: Le matelas est trop dur.

reviews.title: Wifi
reviews.text: Rất kém. Mong chủ sở hữu khắc phục. Cho những khách sau sử dụng

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Das positive am Hotel war der Preis. Im Vergleich zu anderen Hotels ist es eher günstig.
reviews.negatives: Die Matratzen sind extrem hart und unbequem. Die Handtücher werden täglich gewechselt, sind aber voller Haare. Man erhält kein frisches Trinkwasser und es gibt keinen Trinkwasserspender.

_cô bé lễ tân đeo kiếng có thái độ không tốt khi nhắc tôi phải gửi lại chìa khóa phòng. tôi lần đầu mới gặp trường hợp phải gửi chìa khóa nhưng có thể nói nhẹ nhàng thay vì thái độ được mà.
_có chỗ để xe nhưng không cho đem xe vào, để phơi mưa ướt đến tối mới dắt vào với lý do là ồn.tôi chạy xe vào rồi còn phải vòng ra ngoài, nếu muốn như vậy tại sao không treo bảng hoặc phổ biến từ đầu. tôi giud cấp 3 7 năm liền rồi chưa gặp cái khách sạn nào như vậy. nhưng vẫn đánh giá cao vấn đề vệ sinh.

Điểm trừ: Phòng nhỏ, giường nhỏ so với giá tiền. 2 người nằm hơi chật.

reviews.title: Trải nghiệm khá ổn so với mức giá
reviews.positives: Khá đầy đủ cơ sở vật chất: máy sấy, máy sưởi, ấm đun nước. Phòng rất sạch sẽ, giường rộng 2 người nằm thoải mái. Có chỗ để xe máy, có thang máy.
reviews.negatives: Ý là khách sạn ơi, sao mình lại để cái gương đối diện giường thế =)))? Khách sạn nên bỏ cái gương để đó đi vì nó là phong thủy á. Vừa vào nhìn thấy là mất cảm tình luôn á. Tiếp đến là phòng không cách âm, nằm nghe thấy rõ tiếng dép đi trên tầng, ngoài hành lang nói gì nằm trong cũng nghe thấy, phòng bên cạnh còn di chuyển bàn ghế gì đó lúc khuya nữa. À với cả bên trên cửa ra vào có 1 lớp kính trong suốt và tôi kiểu sợ tư dưng có người trèo lên rồi nhìn vào trong thì sao? Cửa ra vào cũng không có mắt mèo để nhòm nữa

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
Mình ở 3 hôm là 3 phòng khác nhau của ks, đánh giá công tâm như sau:  Các phòng đều mới, không có mùi ẩm mốc, không có mùi nước xịt thơm phòng của mấy khách sạn rẻ tiền, không phát hiện mùi cống. Phòng ốc giường chiếu khăn tắm cũng không có mùi khó chịu. 10 điểm về mùi.
Nhìn qua bên trái đi vào cái đường nhỏ kế bên là có tiệm spa, nail, gội đầu, giặt sấy, quán net,.. nói chung khá tiện.
Nếu phòng có thêm tủ lạnh hay máy sấy tóc thì quá tuyệt vời.
Đánh giá chung: Nhìn cái phòng khi lên hình có vẻ không quá bắt mắt, nội thất cũng đơn giản, nhưng thật sự khá ok.
Mình sẽ ghé lại trong chuyến đi Hà Nội sắp tới.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: It was clean and in a short distance to the hospital district, which was convenient for me.
reviews.negatives: The bed was extremely hard making difficult to sleep comfortably. Moreover, the staff was rude. Card payments are not accepted here. Hotel staff also requires all guests to leave the key at the reception every time they leave.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: The staff were absolutely lovely and super helpful
reviews.negatives: The bed was rock solid! I am a camper (so use to sleeping on the ground on small roll mats, and this was worse). A bit disappointing considering how expensive the hotel is.

reviews.title: Lovely room, hardest mattress in the world
reviews.positives: Lovely looking room, checked in late no problem
reviews.negatives:
Mattres was the hardest thing I've ever slept on. Like concrete!
Booked 2 nights checked out after one. Could not sleep on it

reviews.title: Cheap but you get what you pay for
reviews.positives: It's cheap for one night and there's a lot of korean and local food selection nearby, though nothing too amazing. Fortunately the room is spacious and overall quite clean.
reviews.negatives:
The bed is really, really, really hard. I like beds that are hard but the bed was too hard.

I thought it was nice to have a shower separate from the toilet but there's no door or proper divider... So the toilet still gets wet.

The kettle was also dirty even after I tried to rinse it a couple of times.

I booked this place because I thought it would be quiet from the street and traffic (it was) but you can hear what goes on in the building - we could hear the shower upstairs, people coming in and out of the lifts, someone's alarm that kept going off every 5 minutes from 7-8am in the morning.

Glad it was a cheap and relatively clean stay but not going back.

reviews.title: Good value for money
reviews.positives: We needed a hotel near the hospital, and this was only a 5 minute walk which was very useful. The room was nice and clean with a nice bathroom.
reviews.negatives: The beds were extremely hard which we found uncomfortable but not a problem if you like a very firm bed.

reviews.title: Hotel is fine (would give 8 points), but be careful getting a motorbike through the reception desk.
reviews.positives: Cleanliness of both the lobby and the rooms, very kind cleaning lady. The "Deluxe room" is big a well furnished.
reviews.negatives:
It is unfriendly to rent a motorbike through the reception when you plan to go for a bigger trip outside the city. Going outside the city means higher renting price, pay full amount in advance, leave passport as deposit (checking-in when on multiday trip is your problem) and sign a contract (that you don't get a copy of) where you specify the amount. When renting, I asked if it is okay to return the bike earlier and get the money back just in case something went wrong, was told yes. But when it actually happened, I was told that I signed the contract for the maximum amount and will not get anything back. Quite unpleasant experience. :(
Also, the bed is probably the hardest in 4 weeks in Vietnam (we paid for the bigger "Deluxe room").

reviews.title: Of the beaten track stay in Hanoi!
reviews.positives:
If you want to stay in Hanoi, not in the tourist area of Hanoi. This hotel is a perfect match for you! Situated in the student area of Hanoi, this area gives a formidable vibe to your stay. There are plenty of coffee plus food places nearby to enjoy the taste of Vietnam! Do you want to visit the old, quarter? You can walk from the hotel to that area. 
The hotel is clean and the rooms are perfect and spacious. Service of staff is excellent. Recommended
reviews.negatives: Nothing:):) All was very good arranged

reviews.title: Highly recommended
reviews.positives: Excellent in every aspect. The rooms were neat and clean. Noise insulated rooms. The location was conveniently accessible. You can take direct buses to different parts of the city. Overall, superb.
reviews.negatives: The staff didn't know English. But it was no problem, they co-operated nicely.
